explanation: Arch, Column, Dome, and Pediment are distinct architectural elements commonly used as components within larger classical and neoclassical building designs. A Pyramid, however, is a complete, distinct type of structure itself, rather than an element typically integrated into other building forms.

category: Four Great Inventions of Ancient China
explanation: Papermaking, Printing, Compass, and Gunpowder are collectively known as the Four Great Inventions of Ancient China. An aqueduct is a Roman engineering marvel, not one of the four great Chinese inventions.

category: Body Parts That Are Also Common Verbs
explanation: 'Hand', 'Foot', 'Face', and 'Head' are all body parts that also function as common verbs (e.g., 'to hand over', 'to foot the bill', 'to face a challenge', 'to head a team'). 'Leg' is a body part but is not commonly used as a direct verb in the same manner as the others.
